steps.name: Stock search tab, license badge BR-1/BR-3
Stock selection to Asset Worker fetch to assign (BR-4, security)
Wire up tests + verify all AC + real browser

decisions.decision: Fixed pre-existing bug: ProviderRouter.get_chain('asset_stock') derived env var ASSET_STOCK_CHAIN but Settings field is asset_chain (env ASSET_CHAIN) -- special-cased capability->field mapping in router.py so asset_stock resolves ASSET_CHAIN. Needed for /assets/search to route at all.

No asset_stock provider adapters (pexels/pixabay/unsplash) existed yet (assetstock/ dir was empty placeholder) despite being referenced by 3-2's router and 3-5's provider-status matrix. Implemented minimal Pexels/Pixabay/Unsplash adapters + a minio StorageAdapter in this task since 5-3 cannot function without them and no other task in sprint-status.yaml owns them (9-3-voice-asset-worker is backlog and is about voice/asset *worker*, not stock adapters).
decisions.why: scope technically belongs to 3-x/9-x but blocks 5-3 entirely; kept minimal (search/available + upload) rather than full feature set
